name: free-crypto-news
description: Free crypto news API - real-time aggregator for Bitcoin, Ethereum, DeFi, Solana & altcoins. No API key required. RSS/Atom feeds, JSON REST API, historical archive with market context, embeddable widgets, ChatGPT plugin, Claude MCP server, SDKs (Python, TypeScript, Go, React, PHP). AI/LLM ready. Vibe coding friendly. Open source.

commit.message:
🐛 fix: handle Alibaba SPI as GET with query params

Alibaba Marketplace sends SPI notifications as GET requests with
query parameters (not POST with JSON body). Updated handler to:
- Parse action/aliUid/orderId from query string
- Return { success: true, instanceId } as required
- Keep POST as fallback for edge cases

🐛 fix: resolve TS 5.9 spread type error in AI route handlers

Use explicit variable type annotation instead of generic type parameter
to satisfy TypeScript 5.9's stricter spread type checking.

Fixes: 'Spread types may only be created from object types' in:
- v1/ai/explain
- v1/ai/research
- v1/ask

🐛 fix: resolve all TypeScript build errors

- Add ApiError.from() method for error conversion in 7 API routes
- Fix generateForecast/generateMultiAssetForecast arg types in forecast route
- Fix z.record() call for Zod v4 compatibility in GraphQL validation
- Add missing DataCategory values (token-unlocks, depin-data, staking-data, coinglass-liquidations)
🐛 fix: add ApiError.from() method to fix build
🐛 fix: add type arguments to promptAIJson calls to fix spread type errors
🐛 fix: remove duplicate hexToBytes function causing build failure

🔧 exempt SperaxOS + Alibaba API Gateway from rate limits

- Alibaba API Gateway (X-Ca-Key header) now bypasses bot detection, rate
  limits, per-route limits, and x402 payment gate
- Gateway manages per-user quotas via AppCode; backend should not double-limit
- SperaxOS token auth unchanged (already unlimited)

🐛 fix: convert hex strings to Uint8Array for @noble/curves v2 compatibility

schnorr.getPublicKey() and schnorr.sign() in @noble/curves v2 require
Uint8Array input instead of hex strings. Use hexToBytes() to convert.

🔧 fix: Exempt marketplace SPI webhook from bot detection & rate limiting

- Add /api/marketplace/ to EXEMPT_PATTERNS (skips rate limiting + x402)
- Skip bot check for /api/marketplace/ paths (Alibaba sends server-to-server
  callbacks with no browser UA)
@nirholas

- Add alibaba-openapi.json with 15 API operations for API Gateway bulk import
  (prices, global, news, trending, fear-greed, defi, yields, gas, exchanges,
  stablecoins, bitcoin, whale-alerts, liquidations, derivatives, health)
- Spec includes AppCode auth scheme for Marketplace buyers

commit.message: refactor: standardize code formatting and improve readability across multiple files

feat: add liquidations and signals endpoints, enhance GraphQL schema and validation

- Implemented new API endpoints for liquidations and trading signals.
- Added a GraphQL schema for articles, market sentiment, and whale alerts.
- Introduced validation for GraphQL queries, including depth and complexity checks.
- Created a liquidations chain provider for fetching liquidation data from CoinGlass.
- Updated existing adapters to use consistent import styles and improved code formatting.
- Registered new data categories in the provider registry for token unlocks, DePIN, staking data, and liquidations.
feat: add new API endpoints for news classification and price forecasting, and implement DePINscan adapter for ecosystem metrics
chore: remove Node.js upper version cap to support v24.x on Vercel

refactor: standardize code formatting and improve readability across multiple files

- Updated comments and formatting in `src/middleware/config.ts` for consistency.
- Refactored JSON file handling in `telegram/src/store.ts` to enhance clarity.
- Improved error handling and message formatting in `ws-server.js`.
- Introduced a new provider for token vesting data in `src/lib/providers/adapters/token-unlocks/index.ts`.

feat: add full disaster recovery restore script and backup status API

- Implemented `restore-full.sh` script for restoring system data from backups, including Postgres, Redis, and archive directory.
- Added backup status API to retrieve the status of the most recent backup, available backups, and storage metrics.
- Introduced types for token unlock events to enhance data handling.
- Created a simple JSON file-backed store for alerts and portfolio data in the Telegram bot.

Add full disaster recovery backup and restore scripts

- Implemented backup-full.sh for comprehensive system backups including Postgres, Redis, and archive directory.
- Added restore-full.sh to facilitate restoration from backups with integrity checks and component-specific options.
- Both scripts support S3 integration for remote storage and include detailed logging and error handling.

fix: resolve ESLint warnings and extension tsconfig error

- Add placeholder extension/src/shared/index.ts to satisfy tsconfig include paths
- Replace non-null assertions with safe alternatives in deduplication.ts
- Fix unused imports and type-only imports in graph-rag.ts
- Replace non-null assertions with type guards in graph-rag.test.ts
- Replace non-null assertions with nullish coalescing in semantic-chunking.ts

feat: add /api/v1/summarize endpoint, extension vite config, ws-server formatting

- Add AI-powered news summarization endpoint (GET /api/v1/summarize)
  with x402/API key auth, configurable style (brief/detailed/bullet),
  source filtering, and sentiment analysis
- Add Vite build config for browser extension (popup + options pages)
- ws-server.js: consistent formatting (double quotes, trailing commas,
  expanded arrow functions and conditionals)

Refactor components for improved readability and maintainability

- Updated Footer component for better formatting and structure.
- Enhanced Header component with consistent formatting and improved mobile navigation.
- Refactored WidgetBuilder component for clearer type definitions and improved layout.
- Fixed minor issues in embed.js for better script handling.
chore: add @vitest/coverage-v8 dev dependency

feat: enhance embed widgets, WidgetBuilder, and UI polish

- Embed widgets (coin, market, fear-greed, news): add loading states, error
  handling, responsive sizing, and richer data display
- WidgetBuilder: major refactor with improved UX, more config options, and
  better preview/code generation
- AccountSettings: use i18n Link, remove hardcoded /en/ locale paths
- FooterSection: replace text-[var(--color-*)] with Tailwind utility classes
- Header: fix conflicting block/flex classes, condense className expressions
- AIChatInterface, AdvancedSearchFilters, GlobalSearch: formatting cleanup
- middleware.ts, widget/embed.js: consistent quote style and trailing commas
- keys/page, pricing/page: code formatting improvements
remove DL News from homepage sources
feat: add Widget Builder to header & footer nav, enhance widget builder with templates, accent colors, device preview, multi-framework embed codes, and FAQ

fix: resolve 404s for /docs, /dashboard/dashboard/*, and broken dashboard links

- DashboardOverview: replace relative <a href='keys'> with i18n Link using absolute paths
- DashboardOverview: fix hardcoded /en/docs → external docs URL, /en/pricing → /pricing
- next.config.js: add redirects for /docs/:path*, /dashboard/dashboard/* double-path
- middleware.ts: intercept /docs and double-dashboard paths before intl middleware
refine: expand homepage sources to full T1/T2 curated set (homepage only, API unchanged)
feat: restrict homepage to T1/T2 sources only (CoinDesk, CoinTelegraph, The Block, Forbes, Entrepreneur)
feat: add /keys landing page for API key access

feat(widgets): make 'Powered by' branding required, not optional

Remove the ability to hide branding on free widgets. The showBranding
toggle, data-branding attribute, and branding=false URL parameter are
all removed. Branding is now always displayed across all embed widgets
(news, coin, market, fear-greed, chart) and the WidgetBuilder.
fix: redirect /docs to docs.cryptocurrency.cv (fixes 404)
fix: set moby: false for docker-in-docker on Debian Trixie

Quick Examples

cURL:

# Get latest news
curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/news?limit=10"

# Get Bitcoin sentiment
curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/ai/sentiment?asset=BTC"

# Search articles
curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/search?q=ethereum%20upgrade"

# Get international news with translation
curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/news/international?language=ko&translate=true"

Python:

import requests

BASE_URL = "https://cryptocurrency.cv"

# Get latest news
news = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/news?limit=10").json()
for article in news["articles"]:
    print(f"• {article['title']} ({article['source']})")

# Get Bitcoin sentiment analysis
sentiment = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/ai/sentiment?asset=BTC").json()
print(f"BTC Sentiment: {sentiment['label']} ({sentiment['score']:.2f})")

# Get Fear & Greed Index
fg = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/market/fear-greed").json()
print(f"Market: {fg['classification']} ({fg['value']}/100)")

# Stream real-time updates
import sseclient
response = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/stream", stream=True)
client = sseclient.SSEClient(response)
for event in client.events():
    print(f"New: {event.data}")

JavaScript:

const BASE_URL = 'https://cryptocurrency.cv';

// Get latest news
const news = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/news?limit=10`).then(r => r.json());
news.articles.forEach(a => console.log(`• ${a.title} (${a.source})`));

// Get AI-powered summary
const summary = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/summarize?style=bullet`).then(r => r.json());
console.log(summary.summary);

// Stream real-time updates
const events = new EventSource(`${BASE_URL}/api/stream`);
events.onmessage = (e) => console.log('New:', JSON.parse(e.data).title);

// Ask questions about crypto news
const answer = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/ask?q=What's happening with Bitcoin?`).then(r => r.json());
console.log(answer.response);

🧠 RAG System (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)

Production-grade question answering over crypto news using vector search + LLMs.

import { askUltimate, askFast, searchNews } from '@/lib/rag';

// Ask natural language questions
const answer = await askUltimate("What happened to Bitcoin after the ETF approval?");
// Returns: answer + sources + confidence score + suggested follow-ups

// Fast mode for quick queries  
const quick = await askFast("BTC price news");

// Search documents
const results = await searchNews("Ethereum merge", { currencies: ['ETH'] });

curl -H "X-API-Key: cda_free_abc123" \

Security Headers

Header Value
X-Content-Type-Options nosniff
X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN
X-XSS-Protection 1; mode=block
Strict-Transport-Security max-age=63072000
Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin

x402 Payment Security

Protocol: x402 v2
Network: Base Mainnet (eip155:8453)
Token: USDC (0x833589...)

Verification Steps:

  1. Parse payment signature from PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
  2. Validate signature format and structure
  3. Verify payment amount matches endpoint price
  4. Check facilitator confirmation
  5. Verify wallet signature cryptographically
  6. Grant access if all checks pass

Discovery: /.well-known/x402 provides machine-readable pricing

🦜 LangChain

from langchain.tools import tool
import requests

@tool
def get_crypto_news(limit: int = 5) -> str:
    """Get latest cryptocurrency news from 130+ sources."""
    r = requests.get(f"https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/news?limit={limit}")
    return "\n".join([f"• {a['title']} ({a['source']})" for a in r.json()["articles"]])

@tool
def search_crypto_news(query: str) -> str:
    """Search crypto news by keyword."""
    r = requests.get(f"https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/search?q={query}")
    return "\n".join([f"• {a['title']}" for a in r.json()["articles"]])

# Use in your agent
tools = [get_crypto_news, search_crypto_news]

🤖 Telegram Bot

from telegram import Update
from telegram.ext import Application, CommandHandler
import aiohttp

async def news(update: Update, context):
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
        async with session.get('https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/news?limit=5') as r:
            data = await r.json()

    msg = "📰 *Latest Crypto News*\n\n"
    for a in data['articles']:
        msg += f"• [{a['title']}]({a['link']})\n"

    await update.message.reply_text(msg, parse_mode='Markdown')

app = Application.builder().token("YOUR_TOKEN").build()
app.add_handler(CommandHandler("news", news))
app.run_polling()

How It Works

  1. GitHub Actions runs every hour to cache data from main API
  2. GitHub Pages serves the static JSON files
  3. Failsafe page auto-detects if main API is down and switches to cache
  4. Archive workflow runs every 6 hours to store historical data

Client-Side Failsafe Pattern

const MAIN_API = "https://cryptocurrency.cv";
const FAILSAFE = "https://nirholas.github.io/free-crypto-news";

async function getNews() {
  try {
    // Try main API first (5s timeout)
    const controller = new AbortController();
    setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 5000);

    const res = await fetch(`${MAIN_API}/api/news`, {
      signal: controller.signal,
    });
    if (res.ok) return res.json();
    throw new Error("API error");
  } catch {
    // Fallback to GitHub Pages cache
    const res = await fetch(`${FAILSAFE}/cache/latest.json`);
    return res.json();
  }
}

curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/archive?limit=20"

curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/archive?sentiment=positive"

curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/archive?stats=true"

curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/archive?trending=true"

curl "https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/archive?market=2026-01"

Hourly Snapshot Data

Each hour captures:

  • Articles: Count, sentiment breakdown, top tickers, source distribution
  • Market: Top 100 coins, DeFi TVL, yields, stablecoins, trending
  • On-Chain: BTC network stats, DEX volumes, bridge activity
  • Social: Reddit sentiment, active users, trending topics
  • Predictions: Polymarket/Manifold crypto prediction odds
  • Clustering: Story clusters, first-movers, coordinated releases

Why This Matters

Time is our moat.

If we capture complete data now with proper structure, in 2 years we'll have something nobody can recreate. The compound value:

  • Year 1: Interesting dataset
  • Year 3: Valuable for research
  • Year 5: Irreplaceable historical record
  • Year 10: The definitive source, cited in papers, used by institutions

Every day we delay proper archiving is data lost forever.
